---
title: "Redirecting…"
pagetitle: "Redirecting to the Evals Course"
sidebar: false
toc: false
repo-actions: false
search: false
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <meta http-equiv="refresh" content="0; url=https://maven.com/parlance-labs/evals?promoCode=oai-evals">
        <link rel="canonical" href="https://maven.com/parlance-labs/evals?promoCode=oai-evals">
---

If you are not redirected automatically, [click here to go to the Evals Course](https://maven.com/parlance-labs/evals?promoCode=oai-evals).
